extension_name.description: Name of the extension. The maximum length is 45 characters.

extension_description.message: Shows declared web feeds for the current page by pressing a button on the toolbar or a context menu item.
extension_description.description: A short description of the extension. The maximum length is 132 characters.

developer_name.description: The name of the extension's developer. Leave it untranslated if you are unsure of the correct spelling in the localization language.

show_page_feeds.description: The label for an action button or a context menu.

error_title.description: The title of the error messeges.

tab_closed_message.description: The message text when requesting feeds for a page in an already closed tab.

tab_closed_explanation.message: Unable to get feed list because page tab not found.
tab_closed_explanation.description: The message explanation when requesting feeds for a page in an already closed tab.

no_connection_message.description: The message text when there is an error connecting to a tab.

no_connection_explanation.message: Please refresh the page and try again.
no_connection_explanation.description: The message explanation when there is an error connecting to a tab.

no_feeds_title.description: The message title when there are no feeds on the page.

no_feeds_message.message: No feeds found for this page.
no_feeds_message.description: The message text when there are no feeds on the page.

no_feeds_explanation.message: The feeds are either missing or the links to them are not added in machine-readable form.
no_feeds_explanation.description: The message explanation when there are no feeds on the page.

there_are_feeds_title.description: The message title when feeds are found.

type.description: The header of the table of found feeds.

title.description: The header of the table of found feeds.

action.description: The header of the table of found feeds.

copy_url.description: The label for a copy URL button in the table of found feeds.

copied.description: The label for a copy URL button in the table of found feeds after copying.

failed_copying.message: Failed to copy to clipboard. Try copying manually.
failed_copying.description: The message text when copying a URL to the clipboard fails.

critical_error_message.description: The message text when a critical error occurs.

critical_error_explanation.description: The message explanation when a critical error occurs.
